_meta.note: Basic-tier classes (seed of the 50-Base target, CLASSES.md §1.5). Lifestyles span combat AND non-combat (crafter/healer/gatherer/social/etc.) per CLASSES.md §1.6 — combat is universal-but-optional. evolvesInto = Advanced-tier lineage (authored next tier); foundation skills here amplify those evolutions (synergy). specializations = in-class focus picks (CLASSES.md §1.7 axis 2): pick one at unlockAtLevel for mastery bonuses, no Tier change; opensEvolution hard-points a branch and narrowsTo restricts the post-evolution skill pool to that tag. maxLevel null = no hard cap (CLASSES.md §1.7).
_meta.evolveForms: evolvesInto entries are EITHER a plain id (default-eligible branch) OR {class, requires:{skillTags[],minCount,stat?,affinity?}, default?} — PATH-GATED: the System offers only branches whose requires the build satisfies (CLASSES.md §1.5 'Path-gated evolution offers'). warrior/rogue/smith below show the gated form.
_meta.schema: name, tier, family, lifestyle, affinityLean, statProfile{hp,atk,def,speed}, grantsSkills[], signature, maxLevel, specializations[{id,name,unlockAtLevel,focus,bonuses[{type,target,amount}],grantsSkill,opensEvolution?,narrowsTo?}], evolvesInto[]
_meta.combatRoleDoc: combatRole: 'combatant' = fair solo fighter (clears the L4 untethered win-band); 'support' = weak solo, viable with bonded allies / recovery; 'noncombat' = no real combat kit, needs an ally to descend. launchRoster = the curated starter set surfaced in creation.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.signature: Holds the front; foundation for Paladin/Reaver.

scout.name: Scout
scout.signature: Fast, evasive harasser; foundation for Ranger/Skirmisher.

channeler.name: Channeler
channeler.signature: Personal affinity caster; foundation for Pyromancer/Runesmith.

warden.name: Warden
warden.signature: Creature-centric; bigger party + Bind bonuses; -> Beastmaster/Soulbinder.

smith.name: Smith
smith.signature: Master gear crafting; can still swing a hammer in a pinch. -> Weaponsmith/Runesmith.

forager.name: Forager
forager.signature: Lives off the land; Exposure-resistant. -> Ranger/Pathfinder.

trader.name: Trader
trader.signature: Economy & reputation; a town life. -> Broker/Envoy.

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.signature: Stealth & locks; Speed-gated -> Ninja, or -> Infiltrator.

vanguard.name: Vanguard
vanguard.signature: Pure tank; holds the lane and soaks. -> Sentinel/Bulwark.

loreseeker.name: Loreseeker
loreseeker.signature: Reads ruins & relics; hidden-layer scholar. -> Cipher/Archivist.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.signature: Anti-wild specialist; bonus vs. creatures. -> Beastslayer/Stalker.

envoy_b.name: Emissary
envoy_b.signature: NPC & multi-species relations; opens dialogue paths. -> Envoy/Peacekeeper.

miner.name: Miner
miner.signature: Ore & gem extraction; deep-delve survivor. -> Prospector/Excavator.

leatherworker.name: Leatherworker
leatherworker.signature: Skinning, tanning & leather/hide armor; pairs with hunters. -> Tanner/Outfitter.

_tree_smith: FULL SMITH LINEAGE (CLASSES.md §Smith tree) — Basic Smith climbs through all 6 tiers to Legendary. Path-gated branches; cumulative skills; stats placeholder (ARCHITECTURE.md). Heroic pairs converge into 3 Legendary capstones + 1 Untethered (Original-System only, DESIGN.md §6.5).

aegisforger.name: Aegisforger
aegisforger.signature: Greatshields that hold a line alone.

sigilward.name: Sigilward
sigilward.signature: Warded plate that turns hostile magic.

souletcher.name: Souletcher
souletcher.signature: Binds will and soul into steel.

reliquarist.name: Reliquarist
reliquarist.signature: Forges relics that ward whole camps.

calamity_forgemaster.name: Calamity Forgemaster
calamity_forgemaster.signature: Forges arms that channel the Calamity itself — the apex weapon lineage.

worldanvil.name: World-Anvil
worldanvil.signature: Forges armor the System cannot unmake — the apex armor lineage.

systemscribe.name: Systemscribe
systemscribe.signature: Forges items that interface with the System's own layer — the apex rune lineage. Brushes the buried truth.

the_unmade.name: The Unmade
the_unmade.signature: Untethered apex (DESIGN.md §6.5, Original-System only): forges by UN-forging — strips the System's authorship from matter. Reachable solely in permadeath mode.

lancer.name: Lancer
lancer.signature: Reach and armor-break with the spear.

sentinel.name: Sentinel
sentinel.signature: The wall; holds the line for others.

monk.name: Monk
monk.signature: Discipline of body; strike and self-mend.

falconer.name: Falconer
falconer.signature: Eyes in the sky; harasses from above.

woodwright.name: Woodwright
woodwright.signature: Shapes wood into tools, bows, frames.

jeweler.name: Jeweler
jeweler.signature: Gems and trinkets that hold power.

fletcher.name: Fletcher
fletcher.signature: Arrows and bows; supplies the ranged.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.signature: Faith and protection for the party.

shaman.name: Shaman
shaman.signature: Spirits and totems; buffs and ward.

infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
infiltrator.signature: Gets in unseen; strikes the unaware.

cartographer.name: Cartographer
cartographer.signature: Maps the Reaches; knows the way.

reaver.name: Reaver
reaver.signature: All offense; trades defense for slaughter.

pyromancer.name: Pyromancer
pyromancer.signature: Burns the field with fire affinity.

toxicologist.name: Toxicologist
toxicologist.signature: Poisons and the cures for them.

field_medic.name: Field Medic
field_medic.signature: Heals under fire on the front.

provisioner.name: Provisioner
provisioner.signature: Keeps an army fed and supplied.
